videos.headline: Bielefeld and Stuttgart play even in a 1-1 draw
videos.title: Bielefeld and Stuttgart play even in a 1-1 draw
videos.caption: Sasa Kalajdzic's first-half penalty is equalized by Bielefeld's Florian Kruger's goal as the teams play to a 1-1 draw.
